title: Bionisation 4
description: A Minecraft mod about unusual viruses and bacteria
body:
![A mod main logo](https://i.imgur.com/iaehonZ.png)

### Bionisation 4 is a continuation of a mod series about imagine viruses and bacteria in Minecraft, creating own samples by modifying DNA, vaccines and antibiotics, herbs, etc.

While exploring the world, player may come across a variety of bacteria and viruses that can be picked up simply by eating raw meat, or through the air or an attack from an infected mob. You will also need to protect your pets and animals from danger. Every mob has blood level and immunity strength: if the blood level drops due to bleeding - player may die, with weak immunity, effects may become even stronger.

Player can collect different herbs and drops that will help him to survive in future:
<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

Items and machines with herbs. Bio armor grants you defence against some bacteria types and air-spread viruses:

![Items1](https://i.imgur.com/JkfRfyC.png)

![Items2](https://i.imgur.com/OLou83p.png)

![Items3](https://i.imgur.com/MonexXV.png)

![Items4](https://i.imgur.com/vGmLEyE.png)

</details>

Bionisation 4 provides a large number of different effects and samples. All effects are divided into three groups: common, viruses, bacteria. There are also Wild viruses than can appear with random genome.

Infected mobs, some with particles:

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

Some bacteria and viruses has specified particle effects. Be careful:

![Bacteria1](https://i.imgur.com/BLSUfXq.png)

</details>

To recover from the common effects, you just need to do simple things: cold - wear armor, sunstroke - drink water etc. To make cure against viruses and bacteria - things are getting more complicated. If you want to know what have you got - its time to use Bio Analyzer:


<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

Bio analyzer shows effects unless they are hidden. It is required for knowing what genes you need to use to make vaccine or what effect you got:

![Bio Analyzer](https://i.imgur.com/sjZUWlu.png)

</details>

You can create an antibiotics to cure some groups of bacteria, or make antibiotic vial against specific one in Cure Station:

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

Cure station is creating an antibiotic vial. Player need to use it and after some time he will get cure effect:

![Cure Station](https://i.imgur.com/NR3FpLO.png)

</details>

Against viruses you need to make DNA modifier, which can extract genes into DNA pattern from specific items. Genes must be the same as in the target virus you are creating vaccine against. Once it is done, we can fill Vaccine injector in Vaccine creator block:

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

DNA modifier is creating DNA pattern with specified genes:

![DNA Modifier](https://i.imgur.com/EYfgtNq.png)

Vaccine creator is filling Vaccine injector used to vaccine injection. Vaccines are not instant, they will cure after some time with 50% chance. Also, vaccines grant temporal immunity to specified virus:

![Vaccine creator](https://i.imgur.com/xoYwcSY.png)

</details>

And that's not all. By mixing DNA you can create your own sample with positive and negative effects, for example a virus that can spread through air and make all hostile mobs peaceful, or grants the player some useful effects, etc. For that needs here comes Virus replicator:

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

Virus replicator is filling Virus spreader with specified DNA key:

![Virus replicator](https://i.imgur.com/ns65vx5.png)

</details>

In general, Bionisation 4 provides next features:
 
- Many different types of viruses and bacteria, DNA system
- Cures for any mob or animal, just use vial/injector with shift on them
- Herbs, machines, drops, cure effects and vaccine creation
- Custom infinity samples with unique behaviour
- Full JEI support for mechanism recipes
- Flexible configuration where you can enable/disable or modify duration/chance of every effect


Modpack policy:

You can use this mod in modpacks only if you leave reference to this project and it will not be used for commercial purposes.

### This mod requires [Kotlin for Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/kotlin-for-forge) and [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)
